case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) VS. JUAN CARLOS CHICAS ARCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS CHICAS ARCIA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED AUG-12-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARCIA, JUAN CARLOS CHICAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCIA, JUAN CARLOS CHICAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) AS TO DEFENDANT ARCIA, JUAN CARLOS CHICAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
